sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47198" key="h(mioliasmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμιολ-ιασμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n47198.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">multiplying by one and a half</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1147.tlg001:75" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antipho Soph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">75</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
